text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to head out to the summer camp
today, but Vodka is nowhere to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's the hold-up? You think she crashed her air
bike?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you are referring to Vodka, I believe she said
something about "backing out."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Her precise words were, "Summer camp's for
losers. I'm not wastin' my time on that
team-building crap."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Really? She was super serious back at the Derby.
Guess she's not over her "too cool for school" act.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Vodka suddenly in tow, everyone boards
the bus and we're off to the summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whew, here we are. That was quite the bumpy
ride, but the air out here is delightful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Vodka, what was it that changed your
mind about coming?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My dad had a talk with me. He told me summer is
for hangin' out with friends and findin' treasure.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I figure if he says it, it's gotta be true. That's why
I'm here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But don't get it twisted. I'll ride along for the
treasure, but you can spare me all the gossip and
girl talk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You know, I can never really tell when you're
being honest, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, looks like we're doin' summer
camp together, eh, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Can't allow myself to get soft by lazin' around, so
I want the hardest training regimen you've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has slowly started opening up to others. I
feel like she's matured after what was quite the
rigorous spring.
